hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.gd ]] && [ -f "$f" ]; then lines=$(wc -l < "$f"); if [ "$lines" -gt 200 ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"WARNING: $f is $lines lines, exceeding the 200 LOC limit. Decompose into smaller scripts.\"},\"continue\":true}"; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.tscn ]] && [ -f "$f" ]; then if ! head -1 "$f" | grep -q 'gd_scene'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"WARNING: .tscn file missing [gd_scene] header"}'; fi; elif [[ "$f" == *.tres ]] && [ -f "$f" ]; then if ! head -1 "$f" | grep -q 'gd_resource'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"WARNING: .tres file missing [gd_resource] header"}'; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/jbogaty/src/arcade-cabinet/protocol-silent-night && timeout 60 godot --headless --path . -s addons/gdUnit4/bin/GdUnitCmdTool.gd --add 'res://test/unit/' --add 'res://test/component/' --ignoreHeadlessMode 2>&1 | sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m//g' | { if grep -q 'Overall Summary.*0 errors'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"All tests passed"}'; else echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Tests failed — fix before committing"}'; fi; }; fi; }
